'''roshafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:bubblegum|bubblegum]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-sh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bubblegum|bubblegum]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| roshafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:roshafithi|roshafithi]] || [[word:roshafiji|roshafiji]] || [[word:roshafishi|roshafishi]] || [[word:roshafiki|roshafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:roshafuthuthu|roshafuthuthu]] || [[word:roshafujuju|roshafujuju]] || [[word:roshafushushu|roshafushushu]] || [[word:roshafukuku|roshafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:roshafuthu|roshafuthu]] || [[word:roshafuju|roshafuju]] || [[word:roshafushu|roshafushu]] || [[word:roshafuku|roshafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:roshafufthuf|roshafufthuf]] || [[word:roshafufjuf|roshafufjuf]] || [[word:roshafufshuf|roshafufshuf]] || [[word:roshafufkuf|roshafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:roshafethe|roshafethe]] || [[word:roshafeje|roshafeje]] || [[word:roshafeshe|roshafeshe]] || [[word:roshafeke|roshafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:roshafothotho|roshafothotho]] || [[word:roshafojojo|roshafojojo]] || [[word:roshafoshosho|roshafoshosho]] || [[word:roshafokoko|roshafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:roshafotho|roshafotho]] || [[word:roshafojo|roshafojo]] || [[word:roshafosho|roshafosho]] || [[word:roshafoko|roshafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:roshafofthof|roshafofthof]] || [[word:roshafofjof|roshafofjof]] || [[word:roshafofshof|roshafofshof]] || [[word:roshafofkof|roshafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:roshafïfthïf|roshafïfthïf]] || [[word:roshafïfjïf|roshafïfjïf]] || [[word:roshafïfshïf|roshafïfshïf]] || [[word:roshafïfkïf|roshafïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:roshafïfthïfthïf|roshafïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:roshafïfjïfjïf|roshafïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:roshafïfshïfshïf|roshafïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:roshafïfkïfkïf|roshafïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:roshafïfthïf|roshafïfthïf]] || [[word:roshafïfjïf|roshafïfjïf]] || [[word:roshafïfshïf|roshafïfshïf]] || [[word:roshafïfkïf|roshafïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:roshafïfthïf|roshafïfthïf]] || [[word:roshafïfjïf|roshafïfjïf]] || [[word:roshafïfshïf|roshafïfshïf]] || [[word:roshafïfkïf|roshafïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:roshafæthæ|roshafæthæ]] || [[word:roshafæjæ|roshafæjæ]] || [[word:roshafæshæ|roshafæshæ]] || [[word:roshafækæ|roshafækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:roshafathatha|roshafathatha]] || [[word:roshafajaja|roshafajaja]] || [[word:roshafashasha|roshafashasha]] || [[word:roshafakaka|roshafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:roshafatha|roshafatha]] || [[word:roshafaja|roshafaja]] || [[word:roshafasha|roshafasha]] || [[word:roshafaka|roshafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:roshafafthaf|roshafafthaf]] || [[word:roshafafjaf|roshafafjaf]] || [[word:roshafafshaf|roshafafshaf]] || [[word:roshafafkaf|roshafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:roshafasha|roshafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:roshafshësha|roshafshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:roshafrosha|roshafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:roshafmusha|roshafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:roshafyasha|roshafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goroshafnkshësha|goroshafnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goroshafnkrosha|goroshafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goroshafnkmusha|goroshafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goroshafnkyasha|goroshafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:roshashafasha|roshashafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:roshashafshësha|roshashafshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:roshashafrosha|roshashafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:roshashafmusha|roshashafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:roshashafyasha|roshashafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goroshashafnkshësha|goroshashafnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goroshashafnkrosha|goroshashafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goroshashafnkmusha|goroshashafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goroshashafnkyasha|goroshashafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:reshæfasha|reshæfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:reshæfshësha|reshæfshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:reshæfrosha|reshæfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:reshæfmusha|reshæfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:reshæfyasha|reshæfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goreshæfnkshësha|goreshæfnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goreshæfnkrosha|goreshæfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goreshæfnkmusha|goreshæfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goreshæfnkyasha|goreshæfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:roshfafasha|roshfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:roshfafshësha|roshfafshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:roshfafrosha|roshfafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:roshfafmusha|roshfafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:roshfafyasha|roshfafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goroshfafnkshësha|goroshfafnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goroshfafnkrosha|goroshfafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goroshfafnkmusha|goroshfafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goroshfafnkyasha|goroshfafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
